query:
SELECT l.id, l.title, l.lessonOrder, 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM quiz_questions q WHERE q.lessonId = l.id) as quiz_count,
  LENGTH(l.content) as content_length
FROM lessons l 
JOIN courses c ON l.courseId = c.id 
WHERE c.code = 'DIV101'
ORDER BY l.lessonOrder;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute SELECT l.id, l.title, l.lessonOrder, 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM quiz_questions q WHERE q.lessonId = l.id) as quiz_count,
  LENGTH(l.content) as content_length
FROM lessons l 
JOIN courses c ON l.courseId = c.id 
WHERE c.code = 'DIV101'
ORDER BY l.lessonOrder;
